description: Ward checks on Koenig, who’s excited about Skye's progress hacking the NSA. The dialogue takes a chilling turn as Ward murders Koenig offscreen, paving the way for his secret Hydra mission and placing the base at risk.

transcript.line: Oh! Hey. Believe it or not, Skye got us in! We have access to the NSA's complete sat-feed history! That girl's good. I can see why you like her. Uh, the images are a little patchy, but they're gonna clear up any second. Uh, I guess living on the edge really pays off sometimes.
